query:
SELECT MONTH(createdAt) as mes, YEAR(createdAt) as ano, COUNT(*) as contratos, SUM(CAST(valorVenda AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as vgv
FROM contratos
WHERE distrato = 0
GROUP BY YEAR(createdAt), MONTH(createdAt)
ORDER BY ano DESC, mes DESC
LIMIT 6;
